title: Grok Imagine Edit
description: Edit images using xAI Grok Imagine via OpenRouter. Attach 1–3 reference images.

userSettings.name: openrouterApiKey
userSettings.label: OpenRouter API Key
userSettings.description: Your OpenRouter API key. Get one at openrouter.ai/keys.

pluginFunctions.code: async function edit_image_grok(params,userSettings,authorizedResources){const{prompt}=params;const apiKey=userSettings.openrouterApiKey;if(!apiKey)throw new Error('OpenRouter API key required.');if(!prompt)throw new Error('Prompt required.');let urls=(authorizedResources?.userMessage?.attachments||[]).filter(a=>a.type?.startsWith('image/')).map(a=>a.url);if(!urls.length){const prev=authorizedResources?.previousRunOutput?.cards;if(Array.isArray(prev))urls=prev.filter(c=>c.type==='image').map(c=>c.image.url);}if(!urls.length)throw new Error('No images found. Attach 1–3 images to edit.');const response=await fetch('https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/images',{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json','Authorization':`Bearer ${apiKey}`,'HTTP-Referer':window.location.origin||'https://typingmind.com','X-Title':'TypingMind Plugin'},body:JSON.stringify({model:'x-ai/grok-imagine-image-quality',prompt,resolution:params.resolution||'2K',aspect_ratio:params.aspect_ratio||'1:1',input_references:urls.slice(0,3).map(url=>({type:'image_url',image_url:{url}}))})});if(response.status===401)throw new Error('Invalid OpenRouter API key.');if(!response.ok){const text=await response.text();let msg=`Request failed (${response.status})`;try{const e=JSON.parse(text);if(e.error)msg+=`: ${e.error.message||e.error}`;}catch(_){msg+=`: ${text}`;}throw new Error(msg);}const{data}=await response.json();if(!data?.length)throw new Error('No images returned.');return{cards:data.map(img=>({type:'image',image:{url:img.url||`data:${img.media_type||'image/jpeg'};base64,${img.b64_json}`,alt:prompt.replace(/[\[\]]/g,''),sync:true}}))}}
pluginFunctions.name: edit_image_grok

openaiSpec.name: edit_image_grok

prompt.description: Editing instruction describing how to modify the attached image(s).

aspect_ratio.description: Aspect ratio of the output image.

openaiSpec.description: Edit attached images using xAI Grok Imagine via OpenRouter. Requires 1–3 images attached to the message or from a previous image generation. Supports 1K ($0.05) or 2K ($0.07) resolution and a wide range of aspect ratios.

overviewMarkdown:
# Grok Imagine Edit

Edit images using xAI Grok Imagine on OpenRouter. Attach 1–3 reference images to your message, then describe the edit.

## Parameters
- **resolution**: `1K` ($0.05) · `2K` ($0.07)
- **aspect_ratio**: `1:1` · `16:9` · `9:16` · `4:3` · `3:2` · and more

## Setup
1. Get an API key at [openrouter.ai/keys](https://openrouter.ai/keys)
2. Enter it in plugin settings
